title: Functional Models, Values, and Observable Effects · Pipeline Brief: Referential Transparency
summary: Refactor a mutable billing script whose hidden state makes reruns disagree. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp referential transparency increment in an effect map and behavior-preserving functional baseline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test whether an expression can be replaced by its value without changing program behavior.
Locate I/O, mutation, time, randomness, and exceptions and move them behind explicit boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
